_source: Archive.org advancedsearch + metadata API over English/Japanese LOGH queries
_scope: Public Archive.org items only. This catalog records research leads, not redistributed game contents.

items.title: Legend Of Galactic Heroes VII (Ginga Eiyuu Densetsu VII)
items.note: Primary VII CD image; extract client/resources/Face data. Already mirrored locally in artifacts/. Highest for VII assets, not name labels by itself.

items.title: Ginga Eiyuu Densetsu VII Manual PDF
items.note: Primary VII manual PDF/OCR; authoritative for systems, commands, and any roster/portrait screenshots inside.

items.title: Legend Of Galactic Heroes V-Grand (Ginga Eiyuu Densetsu V-Grand)
items.note: V Grand disc; useful for prior stats/art reference.

items.title: Legend Of Galactic Heroes IV EX Win 95 (Ginga Eiyuu Densetsu IV EX)
items.note: IV EX Win95 disc; useful for extracting named character stats/art as reference, not VII face proof.

items.note: Windows 95/98 prior games and update archives; useful for older official character art/stats and possible shared naming/portrait conventions.
